subcategory.title: Skydiving
subcategory.description: Find and book the right skydive for you here. The ultimate adrenaline kick you get without a doubt during the free fall. You jump in a tandem jump from a height of three to four kilometers into nothingness and you don't even need any training. Hotspots for skydiving are Interlaken, Reichenbach, Lucerne, Zurich and Lugano. You can jump either from a helicopter or from a plane.

providers.name: SwissActivities
providers.description: Switzerland's largest activities marketplace — book securely online
